findings.description: gets() is unsafe — use fgets() instead.
strcpy() has no bounds checking — use strncpy() or strlcpy().
sprintf() has no bounds checking — use snprintf().
system() is vulnerable to command injection.
malloc() return value not checked for NULL.
Possible double-free or use-after-free. Verify memory is not freed twice.

algorithms.name: fibonacci_dp
algorithms.reason: Memoized or tabulated Fibonacci — Dynamic Programming.
algorithms.suggestion: Good use of memoization! For very large n, use iterative DP to avoid recursion depth limits.
